category_sources: source_facts.description says Go-related services; official CGoban homepage says it provides go-related services for Unix and X11.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cgoban; official homepage uses CGoban and CGoban 1.
docs_sources: Official CGoban homepage is the best official documentation surface found and describes features, downloading, and project purpose.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official SourceForge-hosted project page, and the SourceForge project exposes legacy CVS/Git project code areas.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes playing Go, editing and viewing SGF files, connecting to Go servers, and Unix/X11 support.
